title: Image test post
body: Testing multi-image rendering in the feed detail panel. This uses existing assets from the project files.

title: Welcome to my feed
body: This is where I’ll share build notes, visual experiments, image drops, and short updates from current work. Visitors only see what I decide to publish here.

title: Night shader test
body: Tried a softer glow blend for node halos and adjusted falloff so dense clusters stay readable.

title: Feed layout polish
body: Refined spacing and typography so section rhythm matches the About page blocks.

title: Mobile density fix
body: Reduced visual noise on small screens by gating labels and balancing panel density.

title: Constellation spacing update
body: Expanded node spread and added repulsion pass to avoid overlap in tight views.

title: About page structure refine
body: Split visual and narrative blocks for better scan flow and cleaner left-right balance.

title: Education row layout
body: Converted the education block into image + text columns to match site rhythm.

title: Typography consistency pass
body: Harmonized labels, body copy, and section subtitles across About, Lab, and Contact.

title: Small motion drop
body: Added subtle reveal timing tweaks to make transitions feel less abrupt.
